title: AssetProperty
content:
# AssetProperty


## Properties

- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` for the Asset Property. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
- **title** (`string`): Display name (title) for the Asset Property. You can use any character, numeric, space and special character in this key.
- **value** (`any`):
summary: Object with properties: name, title, value

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Asset Property. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

title.description: Display name (title) for the Asset Property. You can use any character, numeric, space and special character in this key.
